
--- page 1 ---


Example Protocol Security Review
Auditor: Spearbit
Delivered: 19 December 2024

Executive Summary

This report presents the findings from Spearbit's security review of
Example Protocol's core lending contracts conducted between November 4
and December 12, 2024.

--- page 2 ---


Scope

The audit covered the following contracts in the Example Protocol
repository at commit abc123def456:

| File                      | nSLOC | Contract     |
|---------------------------|-------|--------------|
| src/Pool.sol              |  420  | Pool         |
| src/Vault.sol             |  310  | Vault        |
| src/Strategy.sol          |  180  | Strategy     |
| src/Registry.sol          |   95  | Registry     |

Out of scope: anything under test/** and lib/openzeppelin-contracts/**.

--- page 3 ---


Findings Overview

Three medium-severity findings were identified in Pool and one in
Strategy. No findings in Vault or Registry.
